title: frasera angustifolia
intro: Frasera angustifolia, also known as Bear Root or Mountain Ginseng, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Frasera angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for colds, coughs, and flu. Herbal preparations of Frasera angustifolia can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried root in capsule or tincture form.
